subject: Fermi-GBM GRB misclassifications
body:
S.Poolakkil (UAH) and R. Hamburg (UAH) report on behalf of the Fermi GBM
Team:

"The following Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) triggers,
tentatively classified as GRBs, were in fact likely due to local particles:

527235585  /  170916264  /  06:19:40.96 UT
527241578  /  170916333  /  07:59:33.49 UT
527247539  /  170916402  /  09:38:54.81 UT
527321238  /  170917255  /  06:07:13.97 UT

"
